creator: sobomax@FreeBSD.org
text:
esk@ira.uka.de wrote:

> I believe that the audio/x11amp port is very obsolete now.  X11amp changed
> its name to Xmms ages ago, and no real update has been done to the port
> since late '98.

I'm backing this and if nobody will reasonably oppose me in 24 hours then I'll
delete it.

-Maxim
